codeReview.summary: The strict/noUncheckedIndexedAccess fixes in build.ts, helpers.ts, and interactive.ts use safe local narrowing and nullish fallbacks that preserve existing behavior while removing unsafe indexed accesses.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared validation command definitions are inconsistent: mission guidance/skills expect an integration-real command, but the repo scripts do not provide it.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml defines test_integration_real: bun run test:integration:real, while package.json scripts include test:unit and test:integration:mock but no test:integration:real.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 0ea5e8a. The narrowing changes are behavior-preserving and introduce no latent runtime regressions in the modified paths; review passes.
